use_cases: Image-based portfolio navigation with frosted reveal effects
Creative website menus with interactive hover states
Gallery or media site navigation with visual depth
ai_summary: A navigation component featuring a full-image background with a frosted glass hover effect. Uses SVG filters with discrete color sampling to create pixelated frost reveal effects across 900 hover areas. The interaction simulates frost spreading across the image based on cursor position, creating an immersive icy visual experience.
